title: Healthgrades Scraper Input
description: Search and scrape doctors from Healthgrades

specialty.title: Specialty
specialty.description: Doctor specialty to search for (e.g., Cardiologist)

location.title: Location
location.description: Location to search in (e.g., Portland, OR)

maxPages.title: Max Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape. Set to 0 for unlimited.
